landing.headline: Private room card battles for friends.

room.title: Room {code}
room.leaveHint: Leave the room and clear your saved name

absentHints.none: Take no proactive action. The normal turn timer still applies.
absentHints.draw: After a short delay, draw one card and pass.
absentHints.autoplay: After a short delay, play a legal card or draw, wait, then resolve the drawn card.

lobby.autoPlayCallOneHint: When Autoplay reaches one card, it automatically calls One.
lobby.deckBoxesHint: Minimum for this lobby: {count}. One box contains 108 cards.
lobby.jumpInHint: Players may play an exact matching card out of turn, including during a draw stack.
lobby.stackingHint: Draw cards build one total penalty, and an exact Jump In draw card can reset that total.
lobby.challengeHint: Only the first Wild +4 in a stack may be challenged before anyone stacks over it.
lobby.callHint: Players must call One at one card, and opponents can Catch missed calls.
lobby.batchHint: Play two or more cards with the same value in a chosen order.
lobby.keyboardShortcutsHint: Allow action keys for Draw, Pass, One, Catch, Batch, and Rules.
lobby.waitingHost: Waiting for the host to start...
lobby.allowMidGameJoinHint: Late users can watch now and take a seat when the next round starts.

board.readOnlyView: You can watch the table, log, and scores, but cannot take player actions.
board.pausedHint: Waiting for at least two active players.
board.awaySelfHint: Auto-playing your turns. Tap Return to take over.

dealing.manualTitle: Choose who gets the next card
dealing.autoDealing: Cards are being dealt face down.

batch.title: Batch Cards
batch.chooseValue: Choose a value that has at least two cards.
batch.chooseOrder: Select cards in placement order. The last card stays on top.

log.joinedWaiting: {name} is waiting for the next round.
log.autoPlay: {name} is on auto play until they reconnect.
log.timedOut: {name} timed out and drew one card.
log.mustChallengeStack: {name} must choose: challenge, stack, or take {count}.
log.lostChallenge: {name} lost the challenge and drew {count} cards.
log.gamePaused: Game paused until two active players return.
log.passedEmpty: {name} passed — no cards left to draw.
log.deckExhausted: The draw pile ran out of cards.

errors.notYourTurn: Not your turn yet — hang tight!
errors.invalidCard: That card can't be played right now.
errors.drawnCardOnly: You can only play the card you just drew.
errors.alreadyDrew: You already drew a card this turn.
errors.colorRequired: Pick a color for the Wild card first.
errors.catchFailed: Too late — they can't be caught now.
errors.notHost: Only the host can do that.
errors.maxPlayersTooLow: Max players can't be lower than the current room size.
errors.deckBoxesTooLow: Card boxes can't be lower than the current lobby minimum.
errors.oneCallPending: One call is resolving — wait a moment.
errors.playerNotFound: You are watching this room and cannot take player actions.
errors.playerAway: Return to the table before taking actions.
errors.gamePaused: Game paused until at least two active players return.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests — wait a moment and try again.
errors.batchDisabled: Batch Cards are disabled for this room.
errors.invalidBatch: Select at least two cards with the same value.
errors.batchAfterDraw: Batch Cards cannot be played after drawing.
errors.batchInProgress: Wait for the current batch to finish.
errors.notDealer: Only the assigned dealer can do that.
errors.dealUnavailable: Wait for the current dealing action to finish.
errors.shuffleUnavailable: The deck can only be reshuffled before dealing starts.
errors.handReady: That player already has seven cards.
errors.notDealing: The round is not being dealt right now.
errors.roundSetupActive: Players cannot be kicked while cards are being dealt.

challenge.title: Wild +4 challenge
challenge.basis: A player may only play a Wild +4 when they have no card matching the color that was active before it. By challenging, you are claiming {name} still had a card of that previous color and played the +4 unfairly.
challenge.explainAccept: Take the cards: skip the challenge and draw {count}.
challenge.explainWin: Challenge and win: if {name} really did hold a card of the previous color, the +4 was illegal — {name} takes {count} cards instead of you.
challenge.explainLose: Challenge and lose: if {name} truly had no card of that color, the +4 was fair — your challenge was wrong and you draw {count} cards.
challenge.explainStack: Or stack a Wild +4 from your hand to pass the penalty on.

roundEnd.scoringRuleNote: The winner collects the total of everyone else's remaining cards.
roundEnd.waitingHost: Waiting for the host to start the next round...
roundEnd.waitingPlayer: You will join as a player when the host starts the next round.
roundEnd.spectatorOnly: This room is spectator-only for you.

rules.title: How to play CongCard
rules.goalBody: Be the first player to empty your hand. When you do, you win the round and score points for every card still left in the other players' hands.
rules.goalLastStandBody: Empty your hand to finish and leave the active turn order. Players keep finishing in order, and the last player still holding cards loses the round.
rules.turnsBody: On your turn, play one card that matches the active color, number, or symbol. A Wild card can be played on any turn, and after it you choose the next active color.
rules.modeRule: The current mode is Standard. Other modes appear in room settings marked as coming soon.
rules.scoreRule: Score target: the first player to empty their hand wins the round. If 500 points is selected, the game ends once a player reaches 500.
rules.lastStandOn: Last Stand is on: players finish one by one as they empty their hands. The first to finish wins, and the last player left holding cards loses.
rules.jumpInOn: Jump In is on: any player holding an exact copy of the top card (same color and value) may play it out of turn. During a draw stack, jumping in with a matching draw card passes the penalty on instead of ending it.
rules.jumpInOff: Jump In is off: only the player whose turn it is may play a card.
rules.stackingOn: Stacking is on: a player can answer a +2 with another +2, and a Wild +4 only with another Wild +4. The penalty adds up until a player cannot stack — that player draws the whole total.
rules.stackingOff: Stacking is off: a draw card takes effect at once and the next player simply draws.
rules.challengeOn: Wild +4 challenge is on. A Wild +4 is only legal if the player had no card matching the color that was active before it. The next player may challenge the first +4 in a stack: if the challenge is right, that player draws 4 cards; if it is wrong, the challenger draws 6. Later stacked +4 cards cannot be challenged.
rules.challengeOff: Wild +4 challenge is off: the next player simply takes 4 cards and cannot dispute it.
rules.callOn: One and Catch are on: a player must call One the moment they are down to a single card. If they forget, another player can catch them before their next turn and they draw two cards.
rules.callOff: One and Catch are off: a player on one card never has to call out and cannot be caught.
rules.batchOn: Batch Cards are on: play two or more cards with the same value in a chosen order. Draw penalties are multiplied by the batch size.
rules.batchOff: Batch Cards are off: cards are played one at a time.
rules.shortcutsOn: Keyboard shortcuts are on for eligible room and game actions.
rules.shortcutsOff: Keyboard shortcuts are off in this room.

absentPlayer.none: Away/offline behavior is Do Nothing: no proactive action is taken, and the normal turn timer remains active.
absentPlayer.draw: Away/offline behavior is Draw a Card: after a short delay, the player draws one card and passes.
absentPlayer.autoplay: Away/offline behavior is Autoplay: each draw, play, stack, and challenge response waits before resolving.

rules.autoPlayOneOn: Autoplay One is on: Autoplay calls One automatically when one card remains.
rules.autoPlayOneOff: Autoplay One is off: absent players can still be caught when one card remains.
rules.deckBoxesRule: Each round starts with {count} card box(es) of 108 cards. The minimum grows by one box for every four player seats.
rules.actionSkip: Skip makes the next player lose their turn.
rules.actionReverse: Reverse flips the direction of play. With only two players, it works like a Skip.
rules.actionDraw2: Draw Two makes the next player draw two cards and lose their turn.
rules.actionWild: Wild lets the player set any color as the new active color.
rules.actionWild4: Wild Draw Four lets the player choose a color and forces the next player to take four cards or challenge. A player may only play it legally when they hold no card matching the current color — so the next player can challenge if they suspect a matching card was hidden in hand.
rules.actionWild4Stacking: Wild Draw Four lets the player choose a color and starts or extends a Wild +4 stack. Only the first +4 can be challenged, and only the player who started the stack is judged — their +4 is fair only if they had no card of the color active before it.
rules.actionWild4NoChallenge: Wild Draw Four lets the player choose a color and makes the next player take 4 cards with no challenge.
rules.oneBody: Press One the moment you are down to a single card. If you forget, another player can catch you before your next turn and you draw two cards as a penalty.
rules.oneBodyDisabled: One and Catch are off in this room, so reaching a single card does not open a call window and no one can catch you.
